zh.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 英國戴文可諾福斯同聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.Yaldham, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特沃爾達哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Wadham於1376年出生在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦時，她的父親Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield32歲，母親Joan de Wrottesley26歲。她於大約1398年與Reginald Peckham在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1407年在英國英格蘭肯特沃爾達哈姆享年31歲。

zh-hans.Yaldham, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特沃爾達哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Wadham于1376年出生在英国英格兰肯特萊坦时，她的父亲Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield32岁，母亲Joan de Wrottesley26岁。她于大约1398年与Reginald Peckham在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1407年在英国英格兰肯特沃爾達哈姆享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Wadham was born in 1376, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, was 32 and her mother, Joan de Wrottesley, was 26. She married Reginald Peckham about 1398, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1407, in Wouldham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Wadham est née en 1376, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan de Wrottesley, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald Peckham environ 1398, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1407, à Wouldham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Wadham 1376 in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield 32 und ihre Mutter Joan de Wrottesley 26. Sie hat um 1398 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Reginald Peckham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1407 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Wouldham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Reginald Peckham circa 1398, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Wadhamが1376年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムで生まれた時，父Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifieldは32歳，母Joan de Wrottesleyは26歳であった。約1398年にイギリスイギリスケントでReginald Peckhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1407年にイギリスイギリスケントウオウルドハムで31歳で死去した。

ko.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: 영국 데폰 노우스톤 스트 피터'스 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Wadham(이)가 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Wrottesley(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Reginald Peckham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1407년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 보우드함에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Reginald Peckham aproximadamente 1398, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.St Peter's Church, Knowstone, Devon, Eng: ст питир'с чурч, ноустоун, девон, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Wadham родилась в 1376 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John I Wadham Knight of Merrifield было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Wrottesley, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald Peckham около 1398 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1407 г. в местности воулдхам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
